trigger.description:
Entry point for the graph. Produced by TriggerIntake from either a
reactive alert (paging system) or a proactive eval/drift signal.

correlation_key.description: Stable key for dedup across the lifecycle.
correlation_key.title: Correlation Key

trigger.title: IncidentTrigger

metrics_packet.description:
One agent's contribution to the evidence bundle. Status + criticality
let DiagnosisAgent decide whether a packet is trustworthy and whether a
failed packet is fatal.

payload.description: Agent-specific structured output (e.g. metrics window, vendor status JSON, log slice).
payload.title: Payload

metrics_packet.title: EvidencePacket

vendor_packet.description:
One agent's contribution to the evidence bundle. Status + criticality
let DiagnosisAgent decide whether a packet is trustworthy and whether a
failed packet is fatal.

payload.description: Agent-specific structured output (e.g. metrics window, vendor status JSON, log slice).
payload.title: Payload

vendor_packet.title: EvidencePacket

evidence_bundle.description: Parallel-collected packets joined for Block 3 / Block 4 consumption.

items.description:
One agent's contribution to the evidence bundle. Status + criticality
let DiagnosisAgent decide whether a packet is trustworthy and whether a
failed packet is fatal.

payload.description: Agent-specific structured output (e.g. metrics window, vendor status JSON, log slice).
payload.title: Payload

items.title: EvidencePacket

evidence_bundle.title: EvidenceBundle

eval_result.description: EvalAgent output. Per-rubric scoring on a held-out batch.

per_item_refs.description: Trace / sample IDs the scores were computed over.
per_item_refs.title: Per Item Refs

eval_result.title: EvalBatchResult

test_name.description: Drift test that triggered (e.g. KS, PSI, custom).
test_name.title: Test Name

diagnosis.description:
DiagnosisAgent's structured hypothesis. RoutingDecisionAgent consumes
this — DiagnosisAgent never proposes a remediation itself.
diagnosis.title: DiagnosisOutput

routing_proposal.description:
RoutingDecisionAgent output. PolicyGate validates against constraints
before any route swap is allowed to take effect.

items.description: One candidate model/route option scored on the multi-objective frontier.

quality_delta.description: Estimated quality change vs current route (positive = better).
quality_delta.title: Quality Delta

cost_delta_usd.description: Estimated $ per 1K requests change vs current route.
cost_delta_usd.title: Cost Delta Usd

items.title: RouteUtilityEstimate

recommended.description: One candidate model/route option scored on the multi-objective frontier.

quality_delta.description: Estimated quality change vs current route (positive = better).
quality_delta.title: Quality Delta

cost_delta_usd.description: Estimated $ per 1K requests change vs current route.
cost_delta_usd.title: Cost Delta Usd

recommended.title: RouteUtilityEstimate

routing_proposal.title: RoutingProposal

policy_decision.description:
PolicyGate output. Auditable per-decision record — `reason` must
cite which policy rule fired.

policy_version.description: Identifier for the rule set evaluated (v1 = inline, v2+ = Git-backed DMN).
policy_version.title: Policy Version

policy_decision.title: PolicyDecision

kill_switch.description: CanaryMonitor's verdict at the end of the guard window.
kill_switch.title: KillSwitchDecision
